evals.prompt: Set up this project for sprint development. I want to use GitHub for tracking.
evals.expected_output: Sprint-setup skill triggers. Checks prerequisites (gh CLI, superpowers, git remote, language toolchain). Creates GitHub labels, milestones, project board. Populates issues from milestone docs. Sets up CI workflow. Initializes tracking files.
expectations: Creates GitHub issues for Sprint 1 stories

evals.expected_output: Sprint-run skill triggers. Reads SPRINT-STATUS.md, detects no active sprint. Runs kickoff ceremony with the PM persona as facilitator. Presents Sprint 1 stories. Assigns personas. Team members raise concerns in character. Creates kickoff.md.
expectations: Reads SPRINT-STATUS.md to detect sprint state
Presents sprint goal from milestone doc
Assigns implementer and reviewer personas to stories
At least 2 team members raise concerns in character

evals.prompt: Work the next story in the sprint
evals.expected_output: Sprint-run picks up the next todo story. Creates branch, opens draft PR with full context. Invokes TDD (failing tests first). Implements. Pushes. Opens for review by different persona. Reviewer posts GitHub PR review.
expectations: Identifies next story from SPRINT-STATUS.md or GitHub
Opens a PR with persona header and full story context in description
PR description includes acceptance criteria and PRD excerpts
Reviewer is a different persona than implementer
Review is posted as GitHub PR review

evals.expected_output: Sprint-monitor triggers. Checks CI, open PRs, milestone progress. Reports a one-line status summary.
expectations: Reports milestone progress (stories done, SP remaining)

evals.prompt: All sprint 1 stories are done. Run the demo.
evals.expected_output: Sprint-run enters demo phase. Each implementer persona presents their story. Actually runs the build command and check commands from project.toml. Captures output as artifacts. PM persona confirms acceptance.
expectations: Each story presented by its implementer persona
Actually executes the build command from project.toml
Actually executes the check commands from project.toml
Walks through acceptance criteria with evidence

evals.expected_output: Sprint-run enters retro phase. Personas reflect using Start/Stop/Continue. Feedback is distilled into doc changes. Project rules or development guide may be updated.
expectations: Multiple personas provide Start/Stop/Continue feedback in character
